/src/app/app.component.css.code: :host{display:block;min-height:100%;min-width:0}*{box-sizing:border-box}.page{min-height:100vh;min-width:0;display:grid;place-items:center;padding:24px;background:#07101d;color:#e5e7eb;font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,Segoe UI,Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif}.card{width:min(100%,940px);min-width:0;display:grid;gap:16px;padding:22px;border:1px solid #29374d;border-radius:18px;background:#0b1323;box-shadow:0 24px 65px rgba(0,0,0,.32)}.card-header{min-width:0;display:flex;align-items:flex-end;justify-content:space-between;gap:18px}.card-header>div{min-width:0}.eyebrow{margin:0 0 5px;color:#bef264;font-size:11px;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase}h1{margin:0;font-size:clamp(21px,4vw,28px);line-height:1.15}.subtitle{max-width:42ch;margin:0;color:#94a3b8;font-size:13px;line-height:1.5}.toolbar{min-width:0;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:flex-end;gap:12px}.field{min-width:0;display:grid;gap:6px;color:#cbd5e1;font-size:12px;font-weight:700}.search-field{flex:1 1 320px}.size-field{flex:0 1 130px}.search-input,.page-size{width:100%;min-width:0;padding:10px 11px;border:1px solid #475569;border-radius:10px;background:#070d19;color:#f8fafc;font:inherit}.search-input::placeholder{color:#64748b}.page-size{cursor:pointer}.clear-selection,.footer button,.sort-id,.sort-name,.sort-role{border:1px solid #475569;border-radius:9px;background:#111c30;color:#e2e8f0;font:inherit;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer}.clear-selection{padding:10px 13px}.clear-selection:disabled,.footer button:disabled,.select-page:disabled{opacity:.45;cursor:not-allowed}.search-input:focus-visible,.page-size:focus-visible,button:focus-visible,input[type="checkbox"]:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #bef264;outline-offset:2px}.summaries{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px 16px}.result-summary,.selection-summary{margin:0;color:#cbd5e1;font-size:13px;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}.selection-summary{color:#bef264}.table-scroll{min-width:0;max-width:100%;overflow-x:auto;border:1px solid #29374d;border-radius:13px}.table{width:100%;min-width:680px;border-collapse:collapse;background:#080f1d}.table caption{padding:11px 13px;text-align:left;background:#111c30;color:#f8fafc;font-size:14px;font-weight:800}.table th,.table td{padding:10px 11px;border-bottom:1px solid #1e2b40;text-align:left;font-size:13px}.table th{background:#0e192b;color:#cbd5e1}.table tbody tr:last-child td{border-bottom:0}.table .data-row:hover,.table .data-row.selected{background:rgba(163,230,53,.08)}.select-header label{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;cursor:pointer}.select-header,.select-cell{width:94px}.select-page,.row-select{width:17px;height:17px;margin:0;accent-color:#84cc16;cursor:pointer}.sort-id,.sort-name,.sort-role{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:5px 7px;border-color:transparent;background:transparent}.sort-id:hover,.sort-name:hover,.sort-role:hover{border-color:#64748b}.user-id{font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;color:#a3e635}.user-name{font-weight:700;color:#f8fafc}.user-email{color:#94a3b8}.user-role{color:#cbd5e1}.empty-state td{padding:24px;text-align:center;color:#94a3b8}.footer{display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto minmax(0,1fr) auto;align-items:center;gap:12px}.footer button{padding:9px 15px}.page-info{text-align:center;color:#e2e8f0;font-size:13px;font-weight:700;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}.visually-hidden{position:absolute;width:1px;height:1px;padding:0;margin:-1px;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0,0,0,0);white-space:nowrap;border:0}@media(max-width:680px){.page{place-items:start center;padding:12px}.card{padding:15px;border-radius:14px}.card-header{align-items:flex-start;flex-direction:column;gap:7px}.toolbar{align-items:stretch;flex-direction:column}.search-field,.size-field{width:100%;flex-basis:auto}.clear-selection{width:100%}.summaries{align-items:flex-start;flex-direction:column}.footer{gap:8px}.footer button{padding:9px 11px}.table{min-width:620px}}
